Place DIII public API header here:

- Source: https://github.com/JerryYOJ/Dynamic-Inventory-Icon-Injector-SKSE
- File: api/DIII_API.h
- Destination path in this project: external/diii/DIII_API.h
- Pinned upstream commit for current copy: https://github.com/JerryYOJ/Dynamic-Inventory-Icon-Injector-SKSE/commit/783444cbed8ff02ba4fa59e4c74d57d3d3f90daf

The plugin builds without this file, but DIII integration is disabled until the header is present.
